Setting the tone for the ISS Term 25/26 ✨

As part of the core Executive team, they are dedicated to steering our society toward a year of innovation, inclusivity, and global impact. From high-level strategy to ensuring every voice in our international community is heard, the mission starts here.

join the competition and see where you stand. ⚽

#mmuwc2026 #iss #mmu

The engine room of ISS Term 25/26 is officially in motion 🚀🌍

Our High Committee is the heartbeat of this society, dedicated to turning big ideas into reality and making sure every international student has an unforgettable experience this year. They are here to work, to grow, and to serve our global community. The journey starts now.

🕐 7:00 PM – 10:00 PM
📍 CNMX1005

Passing the torch ✨

A heartfelt thank you to the ISS Committee Term 24/25 for your dedication, hard work, and the foundation you’ve built. Your efforts have shaped the journey of ISS and left a lasting impact 🤍👏

To the new ISS Committee Term 25/26, welcome aboard! This marks the beginning of a new chapter full of growth, collaboration, and fresh ideas 🤩✨

A new chapter begins 🤝

#ISS #ISSMMU #AnnualGeneralMeeting #NewChapter

✨ Your journey with the International Student Society starts here!
Scan the QR code to register as a member and join our growing global family.
Don’t miss out — step into the community that’s ready to welcome you.

🚀 We’re building our next leadership team!
If you’re motivated, committed, and ready to make an impact, these roles are waiting for you:
President, Vice President, Secretary, Treasurer.
Join us and shape the future of ISS. 🌟
Calling all leaders! 🚀 ISS MMU is now open for President, Vice President, Secretary & Treasurer. Your campus needs YOU – apply now!

🌎 Day 2, and the energy’s even higher! 🎉✨
Dive deeper into cultures, colors, and crazy fun 🎶🔥
Keep the momentum going! We’re not done yet! 💥
#iEXPO2025 #MMU #DayTwo
Your name belongs here. ✍️ Step up and lead ISS MMU as President, Vice President, Secretary, or Treasurer. Applications are open – don’t wait! ⚡ #BeTheLeader
Where the land meets the sky and culture beats louder than the drums — Tanzania, the heartbeat of Africa.

We are thrilled to introduce the leadership guiding the International Student Society for the ISS Term 25/26. Focused on inclusivity, advocacy, and global connection, ISS is ready to lead our community toward a year of unforgettable milestones and cultural exchange.
Let’s bridge the distance together. 🌏✨
